comment: Per-stage authoring. Key = stage label 'ACT-STAGE' (e.g. '1-1', '2-7'). ANY stage not listed here auto-generates from the floor enemy roster + the difficulty curve, so the whole game works with this file empty. Add an entry to hand-craft a stage. Fields per stage: { theme: string (the stage name shown in the HUD), special_item: string (optional reward note for the whole stage), waves: [ per-wave object ] (optional; index 0 = wave 1). Per-wave object: { count: int (how many monsters this wave), monsters: [ {type: string name, at: float seconds} ] (optional explicit lineup + spawn time; overrides count), special_item: string (optional, this wave) }. Boss/mini-boss waves (final wave of sub-stage 5/10) ignore count/monsters — they spawn the single boss token, so a boss sub-stage only lists its first 4 normal waves. Tuning defaults (monsters_per_wave, spawn_stagger) live in balance.json -> enemy. Floor 1 below is the worked example; floors 2+ auto-generate.
